# OASIS Monitoring Evidence Template

Use this template for daily checks, weekly reviews, and launch-readiness monitoring evidence.

## Review Metadata

- Review type: daily / weekly / post-release / incident follow-up
- Date:
- Time window reviewed:
- Environment:
- Reviewer:
- Support owner:
- Duty engineer:
- Security owner:
- Product owner:

## Summary

- Overall status: green / watch / action required / incident
- Customer-linked issues:
- Open tickets reviewed:
- New tickets opened:
- Release or provider changes in window:

## Golden Signal Review

| Signal area | Status | Evidence | Owner | Follow-up |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Critical read availability | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Critical read latency | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Invite/reset delivery | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Document storage/provider | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Authorization-denial pressure | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Root/support anomalies | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Scheduled outbound jobs | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
| Rate-limit blocks | green / watch / action |  |  |  |
